name: judgment-server
comment: dev/db run wrangler from the repo root with state OUTSIDE judgment/ — otherwise wrangler's .wrangler tmp dir lands inside the watched assets dir and triggers a reload loop that drops WebSockets.

scripts.db:local: cd ../.. && wrangler d1 execute judgment --config judgment/server/wrangler.toml --local --persist-to .judgment-state --file judgment/server/schema.sql
